Apple Pineapple
San Francisco, CA | apple.pineapple@email.com | fakegit.com/applepineapple

PROFESSIONAL SUMMARY
Backend engineer with 8 years of experience building distributed systems and APIs.
Proficient in Python, Go, and Java. Strong background in cloud infrastructure (AWS),
CI/CD pipelines, and database design. Passionate about clean code and mentoring.

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Software Engineer | Acme Corp | Jan 2021 - Present (3 yrs)
- Architected a real-time event processing pipeline handling 50K events/sec using
  Kafka, Go, and PostgreSQL
- Led migration of monolithic Django application to microservices, reducing deploy
  times from 2 hours to 15 minutes
- Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured 1:1s and code review

Software Engineer | DataFlow Inc | Mar 2018 - Dec 2020 (2 yrs 10 mos)
- Built RESTful APIs serving 10M requests/day using Python/Flask and Redis
- Designed and implemented a data pipeline with Apache Airflow processing 500GB daily
- Improved test coverage from 45% to 92% using pytest and integration test suites

Junior Software Engineer | StartupXYZ | Jun 2016 - Feb 2018 (1 yr 9 mos)
- Developed features for a Django-based SaaS platform
- Wrote unit and integration tests, maintained CI pipelines with Jenkins
- Participated in on-call rotation and incident response

SKILLS
Languages: Python, Go, Java, SQL
Frameworks: Django, Flask, Spring Boot, gRPC
Databases: PostgreSQL, Redis, MongoDB, MySQL
